title.en: The Secret Book of Hades also records some know...

content.en:
The Secret Book of Hades is the supreme divine book of the soul, the essence of the countless years of Hades civilization, and it surpasses any soul book in this universe.

The Secret Book of Hades also records some knowledge about the state of mind.

Because the state of mind is closely related to the soul, although the two are different, they have something in common.

"There is a secret technique on the Hades Secret Codex, which uses powerful soul power to increase the power of the state of mind, this is a small secret art, and it is of little use. After all, the state of mind is not very useful at all, if it consumes the soul to increase the power of the state of mind, it will be of little use, and it will only be useful at certain times!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Before, he didn't think of this secret technique at all, and even thought that this secret technique was useless at all, so he didn't learn it.

But now, he suddenly remembered this secret technique and was ready to practice.

Perhaps, he could successfully raise his state of mind to the seventh level realm with the help of this secret technique.

"Hades Secret Text—Heart Soul Sea Secret Technique!"

Ye Tian began to comprehend this secret technique, and it didn't take long for him to thoroughly comprehend this secret technique.

Immediately, Ye Tian began to perform this secret technique.

"Even if other people learn the secret art of the Heart Soul Sea, they don't dare to use it, otherwise if the soul is not strong, it will directly lead to the depletion of the soul! But my immortal soul is very powerful, far surpassing others, and it is fully qualified to perform this secret art, what a luck!"

Ye Tian thought to himself, and immediately cast the Heart Soul Sea Secret Technique.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's powerful immortal soul power was consumed little by little, and his soul aura became weaker and weaker.

But at this moment, Ye Tian suddenly felt a spiritual power surging into the depths of his heart.

Bang!!!!

Under the influx of external forces, the state of mind gradually approached the seventh level of state of mind.

And with the unleashing of the Heart Soul Sea Secret Technique, the effect of Ye Tian's cultivation in the Holy Illusion Realm was getting better and better.

I saw that the power of that figure was also increasing, and the clearer the Dark Silence True Scripture was displayed, the easier it was to be accepted by Ye Tian.

"Half-step seventh-level state of mind!"

Ye Tian felt his current state of mind.

In fact, his state of mind power was not much weaker than that of the seventh-level state of mind, but it was only a temporary increase in the state of mind power, and he was not completely controlled, so it could only be regarded as a half-step seventh-level state of mind.

Now, Ye Tian is equivalent to standing on the shoulders of giants and looking down on everything, and the mysteries of his state of mind that he didn't understand at all before can now be understood at a glance.

He kept staring at the figure of the Holy Illusion Realm, comprehending the state of mind realm and the mysteries of the state of mind exercises he was showing, gaining more and more, and becoming more and more enlightened.

Time passed little by little, although the consumption of immortal soul power was relatively difficult, there were many treasures on Ye Tian's body that could make up for soul consumption, and he was not afraid of soul consumption at all.

And just like that, a year has passed!

this day.

Ye Tian's eyes were full of surprise, and he couldn't help laughing.

"Hahaha, finally broke through!"

This moment.

Ye Tian's body released infinite spiritual light, as if it illuminated the entire Holy Illusion Realm.

This is the infinite light of the soul that can only be possessed when the mind is strong enough to reach a certain realm, and it is also one of the signs of advancing to the seventh level of state of mind.

Reaching this realm, it is difficult for everything to affect Ye Tian, and even many powerful illusions can be seen at a glance, unless it is a supreme-level illusion that can confuse Ye Tian.

Of course, this is not to say that Ye Tian is not afraid of illusions, some illusions can be seen through, but they cannot be broken.

When Ye Tian advanced to the seventh-level state of mind, his state of mind power was soaring rapidly!

Twice!

Thrice!

Five times over!

Ten times over!

......

In the end, Ye Tian's state of mind power was more than twenty times stronger than before he had advanced, and his state of mind power completely crushed the sixth level of state of mind power.

It can be said that the seventh-level state of mind is much more powerful than the sixth-level state of mind, and the two are simply incomparable.

After breaking through his state of mind, Ye Tian felt that he could completely control his physical strength, even the slightest control.

"It's a very comfortable feeling!"

Ye Tian closed his eyes and muttered.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian had been contemplating the Holy Illusion Realm for some more time, but after reaching the seventh level of the state of mind, the help of the Most Holy Illusion Realm was not great, and it could only allow Ye Tian to stabilize the seventh level of state of mind.

"It's time to leave!"

Ye Tian sighed.

Instantly, he came out of the Most Holy Illusion.

The Holy Fantasy Abroad.

Several Tianzun saw Ye Tian come out, and their eyes probed over one by one.

And at this time.

Ye Tian's eyes looked at the hiding place of those Heavenly Venerables, and said, "Three Heavenly Venerables are good!"

Swish!

The three Heavenly Venerables were all shocked.

"Did he find us?"

The three Heavenly Venerables were hidden, and it was difficult to be discovered, even if they could sense their Heavenly Venerable aura, they couldn't tell where they were, only that there was a Heavenly Venerable nearby to guard them.

But just now, Ye Tian's eyes looked at them, but there was no deviation at all, and he definitely found their traces.

"How is this possible!"

Tianzun was stunned.

In fact, Ye Tian was able to discover that these three Heavenly Venerables did not rely on copying talents, but on the power of the state of mind.

Although the power of the state of mind cannot be used to probe, when there is a gaze, it will instantly lock on to the other party.

And Tianzun's gaze was not perceptible to ordinary people at all, even Ye Tian before couldn't detect it.

But now, Ye Tian's state of mind power has reached the seventh level, and he is in the same realm as these Heavenly Venerables, so when these Heavenly Venerables' eyes come, Ye Tian will instantly detect it and lock on the other party.

Soon.

The three Heavenly Venerables finally discovered a fact.

"Ye Tian's state of mind power has broken through and reached the seventh level !!!"

They couldn't believe it, but it was true.

They were able to sense the state of mind power on Ye Tian's body, which was due to the fact that the state of mind power that had only been left behind not long after the breakthrough, and there was no way to hide it completely.

This state of mind power is definitely the seventh layer realm, and it can't be wrong!

"Congratulations, Ye Tian!"

The three Celestial Venerables responded, but did not show up.

They were the caretakers of the Holy Illusion Realm secretly, so it was naturally inconvenient for them to appear.

Besides, Ye Tian's current status is still inferior to them, if they show up, wouldn't they lose face!

Subsequently, Ye Tian left here and returned to Tianlan Giant City.

And the news that Ye Tian had impacted the seventh-level state of mind quickly spread throughout the high-level circles of the Terran race.

Kungo Temple.

After Kunwu Supreme knew that Ye Tian's state of mind had reached the seventh layer realm, he couldn't help but smile and said, "It seems that the only condition that hinders Ye Tian from becoming the Supreme is completely gone. It seems that it won't be long before our human race will have another supreme, and he will be the strongest supreme!"

And after returning to Tianlan Giant City, Ye Tian rested for a few days and prepared for a big event.

That is to cross the thunder tribulation and impact the galaxy-level realm!
